body.title: Wire LearningPipeline.run_once() into recurring scheduled job
body.result: cron_learning_pipeline.py at 3:30 AM daily; logs to ~/.unseen_university/logs/learning_pipeline.log; crontab entry added
body.intention: I intend that the inference learning pipeline runs nightly without manual triggering.
body.description:
Expert audit (Product Manager): the learning pipeline has no scheduler — it never runs autonomously. The self-improvement loop cannot close without this. Wire run_once() into a recurring scheduled job: either a Vetinari scheduled task or a night-mode cron entry (run once per day, low priority).

**Affected files:** devices/librarian/ (scheduler wiring), or cron config, or Vetinari directive
**Design rules:** run during night-mode (IGOR_NIGHT_MODE or equivalent); log every run
**Scope boundary:** IN — schedule run_once() nightly; OUT — changes to run_once() logic
**Completion criteria:** run_once() executes automatically at least once per day without manual invocation; log line confirms execution with entries_processed count
